falsification_rule_text: The hypothesis is considered falsified if the pre-registered empirical test shows the opposite direction of the claim at conventional significance (p > 0.10), or if the primary outcome measure moves less than 10% in the claimed direction across the sample. Exact thresholds will be pinned in the variables and estimator blocks when this stub is promoted from draft.
falsification_test_text: Callaway-Sant'Anna staggered DiD on community-college enrolment rate and associate-degree completion across US states 2010-2023, treating TN 2015 and OR 2016 cohorts; state-clustered SEs, state+year FE, COVID 2020-2021 dropped. Refute if average treatment effect on the treated (ATT) not >5% above non-Promise control trajectory at p<0.10 OR if state higher-ed appropriations show offsetting decline.

variables_missing.name: tennessee_promise_2015
variables_missing.source: constructed: indicator = 1 for TN from 2015-08-01 (first cohort) onward; 0 prior or for non-Promise states

variables_missing.name: oregon_promise_2016
variables_missing.source: constructed: indicator = 1 for OR from 2016-08-01 onward; 0 prior

variables_missing.name: any_promise_program
variables_missing.source: constructed: state-cohort indicator combining TN 2015 and OR 2016 cohorts for staggered-DiD pooling
